hero.title: Nature's Finest Pearls
hero.subtitle: Hand-selected natural pearls from the purest waters around the world

home.story_text: For generations, we have sourced the finest natural pearls from pristine waters across the globe. Each pearl tells a story of patience, nature, and craftsmanship.
home.akoya_desc: Classic Japanese Akoya pearls — radiant luster, perfect roundness
home.freshwater_desc: Elegant freshwater pearls from China — diverse shapes and colors
home.southsea_desc: Luxurious South Sea pearls — largest and most prized

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.name: Full Name
checkout.success_message: Thank you for your order. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
checkout.cancel_message: Your payment was cancelled. You can try again anytime.

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: A passion for pearls that spans generations
about.p1: Our journey began decades ago along the pearl-rich coasts of Japan and China. What started as a family trade has grown into a global pursuit of the most exceptional natural pearls.
about.p2: We work directly with pearl farmers and divers, ensuring every pearl in our collection is ethically sourced and hand-selected for its unique beauty.
about.p3: From the delicate luster of Akoya to the golden warmth of South Sea pearls, each piece in our collection is a testament to nature's artistry.
about.quality_desc: Every pearl passes our rigorous selection process
about.ethical_desc: We partner only with sustainable pearl farms
about.craft_desc: Each piece is hand-set by master artisans
